agentmemory.description: Universal memory for all AI tools — 43 MCP tools, 92% token reduction

basic-memory.description: Human-readable knowledge graph stored as Markdown files

hindsight.description: Knowledge graph with semantic search — learns from your work

mempalace.description: Conversation history memory — 96.6% recall accuracy (Claude Code only)

repomix.description: Full codebase context packaging — 80% token reduction

mcp-ragex.description: Hybrid code search: RAG (vector) + AST (tree-sitter) + regex (ripgrep)

fetch.description: Fetch any URL, converts HTML to clean Markdown for AI consumption

playwright.description: Full browser automation: navigate, click, fill, screenshot (Microsoft)

brave-search.description: Web, image, news, and local search via Brave Search API

filesystem.description: Sandboxed file system access — read, write, search, metadata

desktop-commander.description: All-in-one: file ops + diff editing + terminal control + process mgmt

sqlite.description: SQLite database access — full CRUD, schema inspection

postgres.description: PostgreSQL read-only access with schema introspection

git.description: Local git operations: commit history, diffs, branches, blame

mcp-shell-server.description: Secure shell execution — only whitelisted commands allowed

screenshot.description: Screen capture and content processing for AI analysis

secrets-vault.description: Local mini-vault — AI calls APIs without ever seeing your keys

hermes.description: Self-improving agent — exposes messaging and conversation tools

memclaw.description: Per-project isolated workspace memory — zero cross-project bleed

claude-flow.description: Claude-native swarm orchestration — 87 MCP tools, hive-mind
